subcodes.title: Words to four ladies from London, spoken on 1913-03-29
subcodes.first_line: Any soul entering the Kingdom of Bahá'u'lláh will enjoy an eternal communion with God. It is my hope that each one of you may enter this Kingdom!
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @knowledge; recognition of God
